name: a source whose upstream hash changed is re-promoted and flagged for new-principle review
command:
mkdir -p state
printf '{"content_hash":"sha256:NEW"}' > state/owasp-asvs.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/universal-coverage-sync.sh --state-dir state --ledger l.jsonl --no-promote --now 2026-06-15T01:00:00Z
